tools_used.purpose: list top-level contents of /home/fenrir/code/casa to understand monorepo layout

approach_summary: Without the IntelliJ MCP skill, I relied on ripgrep-based content searches across the entire /home/fenrir/code/casa Spring Boot monorepo. Searched progressively broader patterns (exact class name, then case-insensitive partial tokens like 'OrderWorkflowAudit', 'WorkflowAuditStrategy', 'AuditStrategy', 'OrderWorkflow', 'WorkflowAudit', and the camelCase bean-lookup form 'orderWorkflowAudit'). All searches returned zero matches, so the bean is neither registered (no @Bean/@Component/@Service/@Configuration) nor referenced by name (no @Qualifier / getBean / @Resource) anywhere in source. Conclusion: the symbol does not exist in this repo on the current branch.
